title: interview output envelope
description: Envelope returned by `hpc-mapreduce interview`. Reports which artifacts the materializer wrote into the campaign directory and includes a dry-resolve preview so the calling agent (or human) can sanity-check the produced tasks.py before submit.

campaign_dir.description: Absolute path to the campaign workdir the artifacts were written to.

artifacts.description: Relative paths (under campaign_dir) of every file the materializer wrote or updated. Always includes interview.json and tasks.py; includes meta.json if the materializer created one (vs merging into an existing meta.json).

total_tasks.description: Result of calling tasks.total() against the freshly materialized tasks.py — the cross-check gate that catches off-by-one search-space bugs at the interview stage.

cmd_sha.description: compute_cmd_sha() over the produced tasks.py. Embedded in interview.json so future cmd_recall queries can detect when an old recipe has drifted.

preview.description: Three sample resolve() calls so the caller can echo back 'sweep starts here, midpoint here, ends here' before committing to submit.
